# HealthSync — Clinic Appointment & Patient Management Platform

> India's clinic-first healthcare management platform. Book doctor appointments online, manage clinic queues, patient records and scheduling.

## What is HealthSync?

HealthSync (healthsyncpro.in) is a SaaS healthcare platform built for clinics and hospitals in India. It connects patients, doctors, receptionists and administrators in one unified system.

## Key Features

- Online doctor appointment booking with real-time queue tracking
- Smart queue management for clinics (no more waiting in long queues)
- Video consultations / telemedicine
- Electronic Medical Records (EMR)
- Patient management and history
- Prescription management
- Lab reports and medical file storage
- Multi-branch hospital management
- AI health assistant and symptom checker
- Payment processing (Razorpay)
- WhatsApp and SMS notifications

## Who uses it?

- **Patients** — book appointments, track queue position, access medical records
- **Doctors** — manage appointments, write prescriptions, view patient history
- **Receptionists / Clinic Staff** — manage walk-ins, queue, billing
- **Clinic Admins** — full clinic management, analytics, staff management

## Technology

- Frontend: React.js hosted on Vercel
- Backend: Node.js / Express hosted on Render
- Database: MongoDB Atlas
- Real-time: Socket.IO

## Contact

- Website: https://healthsyncpro.in
- Support: support@healthsyncpro.in
